text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm preparing for my training session with El
Condor Pasa, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nothin' beats a quick run before training!
choice_data_list:
Don't you think you're running a little too
much?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's no such thing as too much! I wanna run
more and more!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Vamos, Trainer! Let's get to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is always running at full strength
without rest, so I tell her that conserving her
energy is also essential.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... So just recklessly running isn't gonna cut
it, huh? I guess that makes sense.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the advice! I'll do my best to put it to
practice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hopefully, the message got through to her...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Finiiished! Ten laps down, and I can easily do
another ten!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Want to run a bit more, then?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...I want to, but I should probably call it for now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, I think that's what my trainer would
want.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm gettin' better and better by the
day!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Learn, run, and get stronger! That's El Condor
Pasa for ya!
